G1.summary: Has header, action bar, status chips, filtered board columns, and task drawer.

G2.summary: Studio has local token system, but status colors are still partly hard-coded in page and component styles.

G3.summary: Shared component vocabulary is consistent across header actions, cards, drawer, and detail sections.

G4.summary: Shows status, runs, comments, events, logs, and diagnostics, but lacks source-record and audit-receipt structure.

G5.summary: Session/result context is linked, but AI suggestions are not explicitly separated from business facts.

G6.summary: Some focus and text robustness exist, but clickable task/session containers still lack keyboard semantics.

G7.summary: Has mobile header wrapping and text wrapping rules, but no real viewport verification was executed.

G8.summary: Build passed, but browser and mobile runtime verification remain missing.

G9.summary: This round only added governance evidence and did not change Studio UI code.

non_claims: does not prove WAES to Studio inheritance is complete
does not prove browser-level or mobile-level acceptance
does not grant accepted, integrated, or production_ready status
